basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Business Manager / Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.notification_number: Recruitment/IIT BBS Research and Entrepreneurship Park/2026/July
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar has released the official notification for 6 Business Manager / Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation in Business Management, Development Studies, Rural Management, Accounts, Economics or related fields or CA/ICWA, Graduation in any discipline from a recognised university
qualification.details: Business Manager: Post-Graduation in Business Management, Development Studies, Rural Management, Accounts, Economics, or related fields; OR a professional degree such as CA, ICWA, etc. Minimum three (3) years of experience in enterprise promotion/management in a functional area such as production, sales, or procurement. Preference to candidates with sales experience and from premier institutions such as IRMA, IIMs, IITs, NITs. Project Assistant: Graduation in any discipline from a recognised university. Basic computer proficiency (MS Office, e-mail, internet) preferred. Prior experience in office administration/support functions will be an added advantage.

salary_details.details: Business Manager: ₹ 50,000/- per month consolidated + TA/DA on actual basis + Performance-Linked Incentive up to 40% of Gross Annual Salary Project Assistant: ₹ 25,000/- per month consolidated + TA/DA on actual basis + Performance-Linked Incentive up to 40% of Gross Annual Salary

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Bhubaneswar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Bhubaneswar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Business Manager: Post-Graduation in Business Management, Development Studies, Rural Management, Accounts, Economics, or related fields; OR a professional degree such as CA, ICWA, etc. Minimum three (3) years of experience in enterprise promotion/management in a functional area such as production, sales, or procurement. Preference to candidates with sales experience and from premier institutions such as IRMA, IIMs, IITs, NITs. Project Assistant: Graduation in any discipline from a recognised university. Basic computer proficiency (MS Office, e-mail, internet) preferred. Prior experience in office administration/support functions will be an added advantage.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Business Manager: ₹ 50,000/- per month consolidated + TA/DA on actual basis + Performance-Linked Incentive up to 40% of Gross Annual Salary Project Assistant: ₹ 25,000/- per month consolidated + TA/DA on actual basis + Performance-Linked Incentive up to 40% of Gross Annual Salary

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Bhubaneswar Business Manager / Project Assistant posts is 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Business Manager and Project Assistant positions at IIT Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this recruitment by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Business Manager post?
faq.answer: The Business Manager post offers a consolidated salary of ₹ 50,000/- per month, plus TA/DA and performance-linked incentives.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: A Graduation in any discipline from a recognised university is the minimum qualification for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications followed by a personal interview or e-interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Business Manager and Project Assistant are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Bhubaneswar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar is located in Jatni, Odisha, with the pincode 752051.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this job?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state in India can apply for this recruitment, provided they meet the eligibility criteria.
